# RegistrationMechanism.ClientIdMetadataDocumentSupportedField field

The authorization-server-metadata flag that gates the CIMD mechanism. When `true`, the AS supports Client ID Metadata Documents (R-23.11-d).

public const string ClientIdMetadataDocumentSupportedField;
